dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5577 RH: NFIP Extension Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Garbarino introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services
Additional sponsors: Mr. Carter of Georgia, Mr. Van Drew, Mr. Lawler, Mr. Moskowitz, Mr. LaLota, and Mr. Gottheimer
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on September 26, 2025

form.official-title: To amend the National Flood Insurance Act of 1968 to reauthorize the National Flood Insurance Program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the NFIP Extension Act of 2026.

section.header: Extension of the National Flood Insurance Program

subsection.text: Section 1309(a) of the National Flood Insurance Act of 1968 (42 U.S.C. 4016(a)) is amended by striking September 30, 2023 and inserting September 30, 2026.
Section 1319 of the National Flood Insurance Act of 1968 (42 U.S.C. 4026) is amended by striking September 30, 2023 and inserting September 30, 2026.
If this Act is enacted after January 30, 2026, the amendments made by subsections (a) and (b) shall take effect as if enacted on January 30, 2026.

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
